channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Semi enters new Pilot Program with interesting challenge
item.description: The Tesla Semi is entering a new Pilot Program with Paper Transport, LLC (PTI), a Wisconsin-based transportation provider. The company will test the Semi’s Long Range configuration through “dedicated operations within the Chicago market.” Chicago presents an interesting challenge for the Semi, as...

item.title: California’s new $3,500 EV rebate favors Rivian and Lucid over Tesla
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed SB 168 today, creating a new “MyFirstEV” program that gives first-time electric vehicle buyers a $3,500 instant rebate at the dealership starting later this summer. The point-of-sale discount is backed by $135.5 million in state funding, matched dollar-for-...

item.title: Tesla reveals development of wheelchair-accessible autonomous vehicle
item.description: Tesla revealed on Monday that it is building a new autonomous vehicle at Gigafactory Texas, its plant just outside of the City of Austin. This particular vehicle will be geared toward those who are in need of a wheelchair-accessible car that would require no human driver for operation. According ...

item.title: Elon Musk trolls OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Apple trade secrets suit
item.description: Elon Musk took aim at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman on X following Apple's lawsuit against the AI startup.

item.title: Tesla says it’s building a wheelchair-accessible robotaxi in Texas
item.description: Tesla is building a purpose-built, wheelchair-accessible autonomous vehicle, a company policy advisor told lawmakers in Washington, DC, on Monday. But Tesla gave no timeline, no vehicle, and no details, and it’s not clear the “active product” is anything more than the Robovan it unveiled nearly t...

item.title: New Jersey Welcomes Robotaxis, But Only If They Have Three Sensor Technologies
item.description: New Jersey is considering legislation that would require robotaxis to have three kinds of sensor technology and 3 years of testing. The post New Jersey Welcomes Robotaxis, But Only If They Have Three Sensor Technologies appeared first on CleanTechnica .

item.title: Tesla Pulled Off A Shocker Second Quarter. Can It Keep Sales Up?
item.description: Tesla delivered over 480,000 vehicles globally in the second quarter, blowing away expectations. What happened?

item.title: Tesla’s Robotaxi Fleet Is Nearly Flawless In Recent Report
item.description: Tesla’s Robotaxi Fleet Is Nearly Flawless In Recent Report

item.title: Tesla Tears Down Model S/X Lines for Optimus Production
item.description: Tesla Tears Down Model S/X Lines for Optimus Production

item.title: Rivian Vs. Tesla: Buy Rivian to Exploit California’s Protectionist Subsidy That Snubbed Tesla
item.description: California just rewrote its EV subsidy rules in a way that shuts Tesla out and hands Rivian a channel its rival cannot touch, and the timing could not be more consequential for R2 deliveries.

item.title: Retail investors are cashing out of Apple, Tesla, and chip stocks: Chart of the Day
item.description: Retail is selling former leaders, but record market breadth shows the broader rally is still holding up.

item.title: Price Prediction: The AI Momentum Basket: Nvidia, Palantir, AMD & Tesla. Our 2027–2029 Targets
item.description: Nvidia, AMD, Palantir, and Tesla are all riding the AI wave in 2026, but the gap between their valuations, momentum, and math needed to reach bold 2029 targets reveals which name deserves conviction and which requires a leap of faith.

item.title: Tesla Semi adds another fleet as Paper Transport starts Chicago pilot
item.description: Paper Transport (PTI) announced today that it is evaluating the Tesla Semi Long Range in dedicated operations in the Chicago market, becoming the latest fleet to put Tesla’s electric Class 8 truck to work in daily freight. The Wisconsin-based carrier, which has logged more than 87 million miles o...

item.title: After 87,000 Miles, This 2022 Tesla Model Y Didn’t Just Lose Range. It Charges Slower Too
item.description: ADAC documented 14% battery-capacity loss and a substantial reduction in peak charging power after 87,000 miles.

item.title: Tesla weirdly confirms Cybercab employee rides, a huge milestone
item.description: Tesla weirdly confirmed that its steering wheel-less and pedal-less Cybercab vehicle is now in the process of giving employees rides, a huge milestone for the vehicle program. But the entire thing was super strange. On Friday, Tesla released a video stating that there was “Cool news from Giga Tex...

item.title: SpaceX at All-Time Low a Month After IPO: Time to Buy SPCX or Wait?
item.description: SPCX has fallen 35% from its peak, but Starlink profits, Starship progress and AI ambitions support a hold-and-watch approach.

item.title: Tesla Stock Isn’t Cheap Anymore. Buy, Sell or Hold?
item.description: Tesla just posted its strongest earnings inflection in years, yet the stock sits at a valuation that prices in a future most investors have never seen before. The real question is whether that future arrives on schedule or falls apart in Q2.

item.title: Tesla's Earnings Setup Just Changed
Paper Transport Expands Sustainable Transportation Portfolio with Tesla
item.description: Paper Transport (PTI), a leading dedicated transportation provider, today announced a partnership with Tesla to evaluate the Tesla Semi Long Range in dedicated operations within the Chicago market.

item.title: Musk and Altman Clash Again
item.description: The rivalry now spans lawsuits, AI models and competing business plans.

item.title: Prediction: This Is How Tesla Stock Will Do After July 22
item.description: The electric vehicle company will post its second-quarter results next week.

item.title: Samsung’s Texas fab enters production for Tesla’s AI5 chip on 2nm
item.description: Samsung has completed its own version of Tesla’s AI5 self-driving chip and is preparing to start production at its foundry in Taylor, Texas, on the company’s latest 2-nanometer process, according to industry officials. The move confirms Samsung is building AI5 on 2nm — a node that had been expect...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Falling. Can Robots Arrive Soon Enough to Save It?
item.description: Tesla decommissioned its Model S and X production in less than seven weeks. The plan is to replace the S and X with humanoid robots.

item.title: The Real Price of Tesla Stock Is Three Years Away
item.description: The premium you see on the sticker today isn't what a patient investor is actually paying for the company's future.

item.title: Apex Fintech Solutions Releases Q2 2026 Investor Pulse Report: SpaceX IPO Draws Universal Demand as Retail Rotates Into the AI Buildout
item.description: NEW YORK, July 13, 2026--Apex Fintech Solutions Inc. ("Apex"), the infrastructure powering modern investing, today released its Q2 2026 Apex Investor Pulse report, revealing that the public-market debut of SpaceX (SPCX) drew cross-generational demand to become the quarter's single largest net buy...

item.title: MG announces new PHEV technology with semi-solid-state batteries for 2027
item.description: At its Tech Day in London, MG presented its technology strategy for the coming years. The manufacturer announced a new plug-in hybrid generation with semi-solid-state batteries, advanced driver assistance systems, and a highway assistant for 2027. Additionally, tests with Level 4 robotaxis are al...

item.title: SpaceX comes with a slew of changes for Starship Flight 13
item.description: SpaceX is gearing up for the 13th Starship integrated flight test, which is currently scheduled for Thursday, July 16, with the launch window opening up at 6:30 PM E.T. from Starbase in South Texas. This mission, the second with the V3 Starship and Super Heavy vehicles , builds directly on the fo...

item.title: SpaceX is So Complex, It Took 3 Analysts to Call It a ‘Buy’
item.description: SpaceX’s ambitions span many industries, which is creating a problem for Wall Street brokers covering the stock.

item.title: Tesla gets price target upgrade on heels of crazy successful auto quarter
item.description: Tesla received a price target upgrade just on the heels of what was a crazy successful quarter for its automotive business, as the company reported a delivery beat of over 15 percent for Q2. Jefferies analysts are upping Tesla’s price target ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) to $400 from $375, while maintaining t...

item.title: South Korean vehicle import sales surge 37% in June
item.description: Imports continue to be driven by strong demand for BEVs, led by Tesla and BYD.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Slip As Iran Tensions Rattle Markets Again: Why MU, TSLA, BATL, SKHYV, MSFT, TSM, SLS Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment remained ‘bullish’ around SPY and ‘neutral’ on QQQ.

item.title: See How Tesla Tore Down The Model S Factory To Build Robots Instead
item.description: The Fremont factory built the world’s first truly modern EV. A part of it is now being converted into a humanoid robot plant.

item.title: Tesla readies its autonomous Cybercab and Robotaxi cleaning service
item.description: A routine Texas building permit may have quietly confirmed that Tesla’s robot vacuum and autonomous cleaning bot for the Robotaxi and Cybercab is coming. A state filing with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation, as first discovered by Tesla enthusiast Spencer and posted to X , that pr...

item.title: Tesla Update FSD V14.3.5 (2026.20.6.6) Release Notes
item.description: Tesla Update FSD V14.3.5 (2026.20.6.6) Release Notes

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: Tesla Has A New Plan To Fight BYD And Chinese Rivals — And It Starts With Its Best-Selling SUV
item.description: The new variant is expected to sit above the Model Y L, making it Tesla’s priciest Model Y in China.

item.title: J.P. Morgan Called a Potential Elon Musk SpaceX-Tesla Merger "Strategically Coherent"
item.description: J.P. Morgan just outlined why a SpaceX-Tesla merger could make strategic sense on paper. It also got into why investors shouldn't mistake that for a likely deal.

item.title: Tesla’s Profit Per Vehicle Has Been Dropping Significantly
item.description: I just saw the headline “Tesla’s profit per vehicle drops 40%, within Toyota’s striking range.” Now, I’m not sure why this came out as news at the moment, as it’s been a while since Tesla’s 2025 financials came out, but I didn’t remember the company’s profit per vehicle declining so ... [contin...

item.title: The U.S. Is Considering Removing Steering Wheels From Cars. Tesla Is the Reason Why.
item.description: Changes in regulations could help Tesla iterate its technologies faster to develop autonomous driving.

item.title: Tesla merger with SpaceX won't save investors, top analyst says
item.description: Tesla investors who have bet on Elon Musk and his electric vehicle company have been rewarded for their faith time and again. The stock seems immune to prolonged downturns, even when Tesla (TSLA) fails to deliver on one of Musk's grandiose promises. And when he does deliver, the stock also pushes...

item.title: Goldman Sachs’ Insane SpaceX AI Forecast Has One Clear Winner: Micron Technology
item.description: Goldman Sachs just released a SpaceX forecast so staggering it borders on science fiction, and buried inside its assumptions is a quiet argument for one semiconductor company that keeps the entire AI industry running.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Start Installing Car Cleaning Robots
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Start Installing Car Cleaning Robots

item.title: Tesla And The Emperor's New Clothes
Don't Want Tesla or SpaceX in Your Portfolio? Meet the New 'Ex-Elon' ETFs
item.description: Two proposed exchange-traded funds (ETFs) aim to give investors exposure to the Nasdaq-100 and S&P 500 while excluding companies founded, controlled or led by Elon Musk. ‘Ex-Elon’ ETFs Target Tesla, SpaceX Subversive Markets Lab LLC filed with the SEC to...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Robot Will Be ‘Biggest Product of All Time’ — ‘Nothing Will Even Be Close’ but China Is Toughest Rival, ‘No Two Ways About It’
item.description: The next product race may not be fought on the highway. If Tesla and Space X CEO Elon Musk is right, it will play out on factory floors, in warehouses and eventually inside homes, where humanoid robots could become as...

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla, Inc. (TSLA)’s Shares?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy in 2026 According to Billionaire D.E. Shaw.

item.title: SpaceX reveals Starship Flight 13 launch date
item.description: SpaceX is preparing for the 13th integrated flight test of its Starship system, with a targeted launch as early as Thursday, July 16. The 90-minute launch window opens at 5:45 p.m. CT from Starbase in South Texas.

item.title: Largest Supercharger in Canada just had it's grand opening event. 44 stalls @ 325 kW each
item.description: Located in Ajax, ON, it's in one of the largest retail plazas in the GTA with plenty of retail and restaurants in the area. submitted by /u/redkulat [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces New Robotaxi Safety Questions From Federal Regulators
item.description: Federal regulators have raised new safety concerns about how autonomous vehicles interact with first responders, adding pressure on Tesla's robotaxi ambitions. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, several U.S. Senators, and some states are evaluating tighter rules and potential lim...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Will Let You Change Air Vent Direction From the App
item.description: Tesla Cybercab Will Let You Change Air Vent Direction From the App

item.title: Tesla claims Cybercab driving employees at Giga Texas — in a parking lot
item.description: Tesla says “Cybercab employee rides at Giga Texas” are “starting soon” — its first stated step toward putting people inside the wheel-less, pedal-less robotaxi. But the announcement, spread across two Tesla accounts and roughly 2.9 million combined views, is thinner than it sounds. It’s not clear...
